title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates frontier models with access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. The platform accelerates research workflows by coordinating models, literature, and experimental design tasks, demonstrated through rapid genetic variant investigation in a bioinformatics context.
